host: local (Docker Desktop, native, single OS thread)
method: differential wall-clock of two sizes (n1=10000,n2=40000) / hops, min of reps, normalized to C (ratio cancels machine speed); NOT bit-reproducible
note: Complements the instruction-track message-ring number, which is blind to syscall cost and biased toward syscall-based context switches (C swapcontext does ~2 rt_sigprocmask/hop).
